title: 菊花賞の後に・自分のレース

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
You go, Nice Nature! You were amazing out
there!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
I was disappointed that Teio wasn't in the race,
but... you run so well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cries echoing from the spectator seats say it
all... Nice Nature made this race her own.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I ran the race my way, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm glad... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, if this is how the Kikuka Sho ends for me,
then I'm not complaining! I'll give myself a few
pats on the back!
choice_data_list:
I now present you with... the "Job Well Done"
award!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, another handmade trophy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I gave Nice Nature an origami trophy at the
Kokura Kinen to boost her confidence. She's
come to expect it, so I did it again.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I can't believe you made another. Hehe, this
one's floppy too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Nice. Let's do the award ceremony later.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You can congratulate me on my success then. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Kidding. I can't get too cocky here. It wouldn't
have been like this if Teio was here.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she's okay... and how bad the injury
is...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even Teio must be feeling down after not getting
to participate.
choice_data_list: I'm sure she'll be all right.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You're right. She must be.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's Teio we're talking about, after all. She'll just
say something like, "I'm invincible!" and come
back in no time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I have to be stronger by then.
choice_data_list: We still have a big race left.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Big race? But it's almost winter. What big
races take place then?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gasp! You don't mean...
choice_data_list: Why don't we aim for the Arima Kinen?
Why don't we aim for the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature had a good showing in the Kikuka
Sho and has a strong fan base. Surely she can
take on the Arima Kinen now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Besides, the Arima Kinen will bring out some of
this year's most notable racers. Running with them
will help her grow even more.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That would be the perfect race to repay the
people who always support me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...It might be impossible for me to win. Even if I
enter, it might all go up in smoke once the gates
open. Still...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I want to compete in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide that the last race of her classic
year is going to be the Arima Kinen!
